dialog.a: Hey, those fries look fire! *reaches over and grabs one*
dialog.b: Did you just Fanum tax my fries?!
dialog.a_response: Bro, that's the Fanum Tax. You gotta pay to be in my presence. 😏

definition: ，戏谑地声称对朋友食物的分享权。
examples: He just Fanum taxed my pizza slice without asking.
The Fanum Tax is real today—my roommate ate half my lunch.
That's the Fanum Tax, bro. You know the rules.
collocation: hit someone with the Fanum Tax
origin: 2022年Twitch主播Fanum（Roberto Escanio）在直播中的搞笑梗，会
usage_notes: 可以作为名词使用（He hit me with the Fanum tax）或动词（I Fanum taxed his fries）。
